goal: Make Claude auto-init .cuz/ in any repo
approach: Added instruction to CLAUDE.md prompt: 'Before your first commit in any repo, if .cuz/ does not exist, run cuz init'. This removes the need for users to manually run cuz init in each repo — Claude handles it automatically.

alternatives.rejected_because: Hook runs after commit, too late. Better to have Claude do it proactively before first commit.
